posts.author: GardenerInGreyford
posts.text: Just spotted the new wildflower patch at the community centre in Dunmere! It's been a long wait for this to bloom, and the colours are absolutely stunning. Hope everyone gets out there soon to see it before the rain hits.
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless observation of a local event without any harmful claims, threats, or private details. It encourages community engagement and contains no policy violations.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.
